data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of binding rules to attach instrument versions to offers/services/locations. However, the evidence provided does not confirm the existence of such binding rules or their implementation. The linked use case mentions the need for these binding rules but lacks concrete evidence of their functionality, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of binding rules to attach instrument versions to offers/services/locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
